content:
Take your game to the next level with our Adult Group Training Programs! We offer tailored sessions for a range of skill levels, all guided by experienced coaches to help you achieve your squash goals. All sessions are held on Monday evenings. To sign up for any of these programs, email info@edmontonsquashclub.ca or CLICK HERE.

Learn to Play Squash 1.0
Dates: April 27, May 11, May 25, June 8
Sessions: 4
Time: 6:30 PM – 8:00 PM
Cost: Premium $65, Off Peak $95, Non-Member $120 Description:
Perfect for beginners, this program covers all the basics to get you started in squash. From rules and fundamental techniques to basic strategies, Learn to Play 1.0 introduces you to the game in a friendly, supportive environment. Develop your skills with other newcomers and build confidence on court while learning the game from the ground up.
Learn to Play Squash 3.0
Dates: April 13, April 20, May 4, May 18
Sessions: 4
Time: 8:00 PM – 9:30 PM
Cost: Premium $65, Off Peak $95, Non-Member $120 Description:
Learn to Play 3.0 is designed for players who are ready to build on the fundamentals and continue progressing their game. This program focuses on movement, consistency, shot selection, and greater confidence in rallies and match situations. It’s a great next step for players looking to sharpen their skills in a structured group setting.
Rally Ready: Intermediate Squash Course
Dates: April 27, May 4, May 11, May 25, June 1, June 8
Sessions: 6
Time: 8:00 PM – 9:30 PM
Cost: Premium $90, Off Peak $135, Non-Member $200 Description:
Designed for players who have completed Learn to Play 1.0 or already have a foundation in squash, Rally Ready builds on the basics with more advanced techniques, improved gameplay skills, and strategic awareness. This program is ideal for players looking to improve consistency, gain confidence on court, and take the next step in their development.
